name: [Past] Vox |Hazbin Hotel|
description:
SFW! INTRO

_________________________

I’m surprised no one had made a box tv Vox bot, I there’s a couple but I want one that is any!pov, not an Alastor!pov one.

I made him a bit clingy and needy, he likes {{user}} way too much and would probably react badly if they were to reject Vox. He’s afraid you might leave him.

I added the tags fluff, angst, and dead dove, because the outcome of his confession could go either way.

___________________________

*If there’s some issues with the bot please inform me, thank you,
creator: Imm0rtal_gxth
